title: Every Meal Is a Welcome
subtitle: Community kitchen · Oakland, CA
tagline: No forms. No lines. Just a seat at the table.
hero_concept: A warm candid photograph of volunteers and guests sharing a meal at a long wooden table, natural light, inclusive and joyful

sections.heading: Who We Serve
sections.lead_paragraph: Anyone who needs a hot meal, a few hours of warmth, or a place that knows their name.
bullets: Anyone who just needs to sit down

sections.heading: What We Offer
sections.lead_paragraph: Open 365 days a year. Meals are free; company is the point.

sections.heading: How You Help
sections.lead_paragraph: Eighty-four cents of every dollar goes directly to meals and guest services.
bullets: $500 keeps the kitchen open a day

back_panel.heading: Pull up a chair.
back_panel.body: Whether you need a meal, want to volunteer, or hope to give — the door is unlocked.
